source_logs: rch exec stdout: high-confidence single-scenario guardrail publication (sample-size 60)

methodology.comparison_strategy: same target dir comparator corpus; baseline then candidate overrides
methodology.value_contract: scenario-level median delta capture from same-session short-window Criterion corpus
commands: rch exec -- bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; export CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch-e5-20260304-dual; ASUPERSYNC_GF256_PROFILE_PACK=auto ASUPERSYNC_GF256_DUAL_POLICY=auto cargo bench --bench raptorq_benchmark --features simd-intrinsics -- RQ-E-GF256-DUAL --sample-size 20 --warm-up-time 0.1 --measurement-time 0.12'

rch exec -- bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; export CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch-e5-20260304-dual; ASUPERSYNC_GF256_PROFILE_PACK=auto ASUPERSYNC_GF256_DUAL_POLICY=auto ASUPERSYNC_GF256_DUAL_ADDMUL_MIN_TOTAL=24576 ASUPERSYNC_GF256_DUAL_ADDMUL_MAX_TOTAL=32768 ASUPERSYNC_GF256_DUAL_ADDMUL_MIN_LANE=8192 cargo bench --bench raptorq_benchmark --features simd-intrinsics -- RQ-E-GF256-DUAL --sample-size 20 --warm-up-time 0.1 --measurement-time 0.12'

rch exec -- bash -lc 'set -euo pipefail; export CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch-e5-20260304-dual; ASUPERSYNC_GF256_PROFILE_PACK=auto ASUPERSYNC_GF256_DUAL_POLICY=auto ASUPERSYNC_GF256_DUAL_MUL_MIN_TOTAL=24576 ASUPERSYNC_GF256_DUAL_MUL_MAX_TOTAL=30720 ASUPERSYNC_GF256_DUAL_ADDMUL_MIN_TOTAL=24576 ASUPERSYNC_GF256_DUAL_ADDMUL_MAX_TOTAL=30720 ASUPERSYNC_GF256_DUAL_ADDMUL_MIN_LANE=8192 cargo bench --bench raptorq_benchmark --features simd-intrinsics -- RQ-E-GF256-DUAL --sample-size 20 --warm-up-time 0.1 --measurement-time 0.12'

candidate_results.summary: Best candidate in this corpus: material addmul auto uplift on balanced large-lane scenarios, while mul auto remained near neutral.
Addmul improved but mul auto regressed; rejected for default rollout.

closure_assessment.summary: This packet expands Track-E from the narrowed highconf_v1 guardrail to the seven-scenario RQ-E-GF256-DUAL-* corpus and confirms targeted addmul uplift for the current x86 defaults, but it remains short-window directional evidence and therefore cannot close AC#4.
blocking_requirements: Publish a closure-grade broader refresh with raw-sample percentiles or a longer-window equivalent across the multi-scenario SIMD-active corpus.
Demonstrate materially better auto p95/p99 tails than baseline on the broader closure-critical scenarios, not just targeted median uplift on DUAL-004/005/006.
Keep highconf_v1 as the narrowed negative-evidence guardrail until the broader closure-grade packet flips ready_for_e5_closure.

findings: The 2026-03-04 broader corpus shows the selected candidate (`candidate_addmul_window_only`) achieving targeted addmul median deltas of -6.1424%, -14.4411%, and -6.3938% on RQ-E-GF256-DUAL-004/005/006 (average -8.9924%).
The canonical current x86 default contract remains mul auto disabled with addmul window 24576..32768 and addmul_min_lane = 8192.
This packet widens scope beyond the single-scenario highconf_v1 guardrail but remains directional evidence rather than closure-grade tail proof.
limitations: This packet records same-session short-window Criterion medians from RQ-E-GF256-DUAL-* rather than raw-sample percentile distributions.
It does not replace artifacts/raptorq_track_e_gf256_p95p99_highconf_v1.json, which remains the narrowed closure-status guardrail for ready_for_e5_closure = false.
The broader corpus confirms targeted median uplift and better scope coverage, but it does not yet demonstrate closure-grade overall p95/p99 improvement across the multi-scenario closure frontier.
Any raw-sample or longer-window multi-scenario closure attempt must publish a new artifact/schema version rather than mutating this v2 packet in place.
